<?php namespace Laravel\Sanctum\Http\Controllers; use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse; use Illuminate\Http\Request; use Illuminate\Http\Response; class CsrfCookieController { /** * Return an empty response simply to trigger the storage of the CSRF cookie in the browser. * * @param \Illuminate\Http\Request $request * @return \Illuminate\Http\Response|\Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse */ public function show(Request $request) { if ($request->expectsJson()) { return new JsonResponse(status: 204); } return new Response(status: 204); } }
